emails.subject: RE: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: RE: Netco Sitara Access For West: Risk(give these people access to all regions)- Phillip Love Randy Bhatia Melissa Videtto Stephanie Hopkins Ryan O'Rourke Zach McCarroll Traders(just West access)- Mike Grigsby Phillip Allen Keith Holst Frank Ermis Jay Reitmeyer Jane Tholt Matt Lenhart Jason Wolfe Matt Smith I will have Patti Sullivan from logistics send you her list. Thanks. PL

emails.subject: RE: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: Has there been any updates to the Netco access requested? Russ

emails.subject: RE: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: Add Steve South to the Trader list and remove the following from Risk: Zach McCarroll, Stephanie Hopkins. Thanks. PL
